# SDK 1.0.3 Data-Part Fixtures

The official `a2a-sdk 1.0.3` protobuf `Part` descriptor matched 1.1.0 for the checked data subset: `data` is accepted directly and `kind`/`type` are rejected as unknown fields.

These are sanitized harness fixtures. They document parity with the 1.1.0 data-part field shape without adding the SDK as a runtime dependency.
